items.title: Show HN: OpenFeed – private dev news in your new tab, with LinkedIn and X feeds
items.snippet:
Fork of Hackertab (https://github.com/medyo/hackertab.dev). All sources fetch directly in your browser - nothing goes through a server.

LinkedIn and X work via your existing session cookies.

items.title: Show HN: Clodcapture – save and resume Claude.ai chats across sessions
items.snippet: Chrome extension that captures Claude.ai conversation state and lets you reload it into a new chat. All local, no account, free. Solves the "I lost my whole debugging session" problem.

items.title: Cancelling Claude subscription renewal immediately revokes Design access
items.snippet:
Starting today, Anthropic now immediately revokes Claude Design access if you cancel your subscription plan renewal, even while you're still in a valid period. I had a Claude 20x max plan and cancelled my automatic renewal this month (last week)

items.title: Claude's signup workflow is terrible
items.snippet:
I used claude via the web console for a while, then thought I'd want to go for higher limits, and API usage.

I click and end up here https://claude.ai/upgrade.

Does it say anything about API or not? Does it explain what the usage limits are? How often they reset?

No.

Do
